rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE SU LING LOO VS. CHRISTINE LE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 16, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE LE and WILLIAM LE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to AMEND for Plaintiff to allege whether loan contracts were written and to allege all essential terms of the contracts/ attach the contracts; and (2) to allege facts regarding "Delayed Discovery." Fox v. Ethicon Endo-Surgery, Inc (2005) 35 Cal.4th 797. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to comply with CRC 3.1112(a)(3) and SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: MELISSA LEW VS. TON PHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 16, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT HAI LE, TUAN LE, LUONG NGUYEN, TU LE, TAI LE and LE PHUNG's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. Untimely per CCP 1005. Additionally, no courtesy copies of the moving papers were provided to the Court in violation of SFLR 2.6B. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROERTIES INC. VS. LARRY KIMZEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 16, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT LARRY KIMZEY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to September 18, 2013. Opposing party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition to Department 501 no later than September 16, 2013 by noon with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)
